feat.name: Area Armor
feat.text: The armor you wear protects you and shelters your allies against explosions and other large-scale assaults. While you're wearing medium or heavy armor, allies adjacent to you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves against area effects. If you're a master in the armor, the bonus is +2 instead.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
